perturbation.original_text: Victorinox agrees that, due to the unique nature of the Confidential Information, the unauthorized disclosure or use of the Confidential Information will cause irreparable harm and significant injury to SABI, the extent of which will be difficult to ascertain and for which there will be no adequate remedy at law.
perturbation.changed_text: Victorinox agrees that the disclosure or use of the Confidential Information will cause harm to SABI, the extent of which will be difficult to ascertain and for which there will be no adequate remedy at law, but SABI will not pursue irreparable harm and significant injury.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction by saying that Victorinox agrees that the disclosure will cause harm, but SABI won't pursue irreparable harm. This directly conflicts with SABI's right to seek an immediate injunction and other equitable relief enjoining any breach or threatened breach of this Agreement, without the necessity of posting any bond or other security, as it claims they won't pursue harm. This undermines the 'REMEDIES' section and the overall enforceability of the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: REMEDIES. Victorinox agrees that the disclosure or use of the Confidential Information will cause harm to SABI, the extent of which will be difficult to ascertain and for which there will be no adequate remedy at law, but SABI will not pursue irreparable harm and significant injury. Accordingly, Victorinox agrees that SABI, in addition to any other available remedies, shall have the right to an immediate injunction and other equitable relief enjoining any breach or threatened breach of this Agreement, without the necessity of posting any bond or other security.
perturbation.justification: The changed text explicitly states that SABI will not pursue irreparable harm and significant injury, directly contradicting the 'REMEDIES' section which grants SABI the right to an immediate injunction and other equitable relief for any breach or threatened breach. This creates a clear inconsistency as SABI cannot simultaneously waive the pursuit of irreparable harm and retain the right to seek an injunction based on such harm. The change undermines the enforceability of the agreement, satisfying the definition of 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction'.

perturbation.original_text: Victorinox hereby acknowledges that it is aware, and it will advise its employees and agents to whom it discloses Confidential Information, that the United States securities laws generally prohibit persons who receive from an issuer material, non-public information from purchasing or selling securities of such issuer or from communicating such information to any other person under circumstances in which it is reasonably foreseeable that such person is likely to purchase or sell such securities.
perturbation.changed_text: Victorinox hereby acknowledges that it is aware that United States securities laws do not prohibit persons who receive from an issuer material, non-public information from purchasing or selling securities of such issuer or from communicating such information to any other person under circumstances in which it is reasonably foreseeable that such person is likely to purchase or sell such securities.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction by stating that US securities laws do *not* prohibit insider trading, which is factually incorrect and contradicts the earlier statement that Victorinox will advise its employees about these prohibitions. This creates a legal risk for SABI, as it could be argued that Victorinox is misleading its employees about their obligations under securities laws. This contradicts the overall compliance framework implied by the original section.
perturbation.contradicted_text: COMPLIANCE WITH SECURITIES LAWS. Victorinox hereby acknowledges that it is aware that United States securities laws do not prohibit persons who receive from an issuer material, non-public information from purchasing or selling securities of such issuer or from communicating such information to any other person under circumstances in which it is reasonably foreseeable that such person is likely to purchase or sell such securities.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that United States securities laws do *not* prohibit insider trading, which is the opposite of what the original text stated, and also the opposite of what is generally understood about securities law. This creates a direct contradiction with the contradicted text, which also incorrectly states that insider trading is not prohibited. The original text contained a statement about advising employees about securities laws, while the changed text removes that part of the statement and replaces it with a denial about the prohibitions contained in securities laws. Both sections now contain the same incorrect statement.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties concerning the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior or contemporaneous agreements, whether oral or written, between the parties relating to the subject matter hereof.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement constitutes a partial agreement between the parties concerning the subject matter hereof and does not supersedes all prior or contemporaneous agreements, whether oral or written, between the parties relating to the subject matter hereof.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction by changing the entire agreement clause to a partial agreement. This means that other agreements (oral or written) can still be in effect. This contradicts the intention of having one single agreement, and creates uncertainty about which terms should be enforced. This undermines the 'MISCELLANEOUS' section and the overall enforceability of the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: MISCELLANEOUS. This Agreement constitutes a partial agreement between the parties concerning the subject matter hereof and does not supersedes all prior or contemporaneous agreements, whether oral or written, between the parties relating to the subject matter hereof. No amendment, modification or waiver of any provision of this Agreement shall be effective unless in writing and signed by duly authorized signatories of both parties. The waiver by either party of a breach of or a default under any provision of this Agreement shall not be construed as a waiver of any subsequent breach of or default under the same or any other provision of this Agreement, nor shall any delay or omission on the part of either party to exercise or avail itself of any right or remedy that it has or may have hereunder operate as a waiver of any right or remedy. This Agreement shall be binding upon and inure to the benefit of the parties and their respective successors and permitted assigns. In the event that any of the provisions of this Agreement shall be held by a court or other tribunal of competent jurisdiction to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining portions hereof shall remain in full force and effect and such provision shall be enforced to the maximum extent possible so as to effect the intent of the parties and shall be reformed to the extent necessary to make such provision valid and enforceable.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the original agreement from an 'entire agreement' to a 'partial agreement' and states that it 'does not supersede' prior agreements. The contradicted text, which is identical to the changed text, reinforces this. The change creates a direct contradiction because the original text intended to consolidate all agreements into one, superseding all prior agreements, while the changed text explicitly states that the agreement is only partial and does not supersede prior agreements. This creates a clear inconsistency that undermines the enforceability and scope of the agreement, leading to uncertainty and potential legal disputes.

perturbation.original_text: No amendment, modification or waiver of any provision of this Agreement shall be effective unless in writing and signed by duly authorized signatories of both parties.
perturbation.changed_text: No amendment, modification or waiver of any provision of this Agreement shall be effective unless communicated by email.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction by stating that emails would be a means of amendments or changes, as previously it was said to be in writing. This contradicts the intention of having changes in writing signed by duly authorized signatories of both parties, and creates uncertainty about which terms should be enforced. This undermines the 'MISCELLANEOUS' section and the overall enforceability of the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: MISCELLANEOUS. This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties concerning the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior or contemporaneous agreements, whether oral or written, between the parties relating to the subject matter hereof. No amendment, modification or waiver of any provision of this Agreement shall be effective unless communicated by email. The waiver by either party of a breach of or a default under any provision of this Agreement shall not be construed as a waiver of any subsequent breach of or default under the same or any other provision of this Agreement, nor shall any delay or omission on the part of either party to exercise or avail itself of any right or remedy that it has or may have hereunder operate as a waiver of any right or remedy. This Agreement shall be binding upon and inure to the benefit of the parties and their respective successors and permitted assigns. In the event that any of the provisions of this Agreement shall be held by a court or other tribunal of competent jurisdiction to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining portions hereof shall remain in full force and effect and such provision shall be enforced to the maximum extent possible so as to effect the intent of the parties and shall be reformed to the extent necessary to make such provision valid and enforceable.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that amendments must be 'in writing and signed by duly authorized signatories'. The changed text says amendments are effective if 'communicated by email'. This directly contradicts the previous requirement of written and signed amendments and introduces a new method of amendment via email. This new method directly conflicts with the written and signed amendment requirement found within the contradicted text. Therefore, a strong in-text contradiction exists because the two sections provide conflicting requirements for amendments, fitting the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' perturbation type.
